core: Deep Strike , Fights First , Infiltrators , Lone Operative

datasheet.text: At the end of the Fight phase , if this model is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Fall Back move of up to D6". In addition, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this model is not within 3" of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and then, in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase , set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models. If the battle ends and this model is not on the battlefield, it is destroyed .
datasheet.name: Acrobatic Escape

datasheet.text: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem , if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.
datasheet.name: Lord of Deceit (Aura)

unit_composition.text: neural shredder; phase sword and poison blades.
unit_composition.label: This model is equipped with

entries.label: CORE
items: Deep Strike , Fights First , Infiltrators , Lone Operative

In addition, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this model is not within 3" of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and then, in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase , set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models. entries.name: Lord of Deceit (Aura)

entries.text: neural shredder; phase sword and poison blades.
entries.label: This model is equipped with

entries.text: This model cannot be selected to be your WARLORD . If your army faction is AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM , then during the Declare Battle Formations step, you can replace this model with a different OFFICIO ASSASSINORUM model, provided the total points value of the new model does not exceed the points value of the model it replaced. Your army cannot include duplicates of the same model (i.e. after replacing a model with this rule, your army cannot have more than 1 VINDICARE ASSASSIN , it cannot have more than 1 CULEXUS ASSASSIN , it cannot have more than 1 EVERSOR ASSASSIN and it cannot have more than 1 CALLIDUS ASSASSIN ).

datasheet.text: In your Movement phase , when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform an etheric emergence. If it does, this model can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge .
datasheet.name: Etheric Emergence

datasheet.text: This model has the Feel No Pain 2+ ability against Psychic Attacks .
datasheet.name: Abomination

datasheet.text: Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase , this model can use this ability. If it does, each enemy unit within 9" of this model must take a Battle-shock test , subtracting 1 from that test (or subtracting 2 if that unit is a PSYKER ).
datasheet.name: Soulless Horror

entries.text: In your Movement phase , when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform an etheric emergence. If it does, this model can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge .
entries.name: Etheric Emergence

entries.text: This model has the Feel No Pain 2+ ability against Psychic Attacks .

entries.text: Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase , this model can use this ability. If it does, each enemy unit within 9" of this model must take a Battle-shock test , subtracting 1 from that test (or subtracting 2 if that unit is a PSYKER ).

entries.text: This model cannot be selected to be your WARLORD . If your army faction is AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM , then during the Declare Battle Formations step, you can replace this model with a different OFFICIO ASSASSINORUM model, provided the total points value of the new model does not exceed the points value of the model it replaced. Your army cannot include duplicates of the same model (i.e. after replacing a model with this rule, your army cannot have more than 1 VINDICARE ASSASSIN , it cannot have more than 1 CULEXUS ASSASSIN , it cannot have more than 1 EVERSOR ASSASSIN and it cannot have more than 1 CALLIDUS ASSASSIN ).

core: Deadly Demise D3 , Lone Operative , Scouts 9"

datasheet.text: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced .
datasheet.name: Frenzon

datasheet.text: Once per battle, in your Movement phase , this model can use this ability before it makes a Normal move . If it does, until the end of the turn, add 6" to this model’s Move characteristic and add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s melee weapons.
datasheet.name: Overkill

unit_composition.text: executioner pistol; power sword and neuro gauntlet.
unit_composition.label: This model is equipped with

rows.label: 1 model ( AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM Detachment)

datasheet.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, when selecting targets for that attack, you can ignore the Lone Operative ability.
datasheet.name: Deadshot

datasheet.text: Once per battle, when selecting targets for this model’s exitus rifle, it can fire a shieldbreaker round. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack with that weapon, add 1 to the Wound roll and any successful Wound roll scores a Critical Wound .
datasheet.name: Shieldbreaker

unit_composition.text: exitus pistol; exitus rifle; Vindicare combat knife.
unit_composition.label: This model is equipped with
